title: Dolphin Jockey
description: This mod makes drowned zombies seek out nearby dolphins so they can become jockeys.
body:
**Requires [Jockey API](https://modrinth.com/mod/jockey-api)**

This mod makes drowned zombies seek out nearby dolphins so they can become jockeys.

## Other Jockey Mods
- [Bedrock Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrock-jockey)
- [Chicken Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/chickenjockey)
- [Spider Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/spider-jockey)
